_publications._publicationTitle: Nilotinib is more potent than imatinib for treating plexiform neurofibroma in vitro and in vivo.

_contextSnippet: The body weights of mice increased 10% (23.9 ±1.0 to 26.4 ±1.6 g) in the control group and 7% (23.4 ±1.8 to 25.1 ±1.8 g) in the nilotinib group but not in the imatinib group (2% = 23.3 ±1.2 to 23.7 ±1.7 g) over the 28-days
resourceName: athymic nude mice (female, nu/nu Balb/c, 6 weeks, 20 g)
details: Body weights increased 10% in control group (23.9±1.0 to 26.4±1.6 g), 7% in nilotinib group (23.4±1.8 to 25.1±1.8 g), and only 2% in imatinib group (23.3±1.2 to 23.7±1.7 g) over 28 days. Significant difference between imatinib and control groups (P<0.05).
